INBOtheme 0.5.8
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Available themes in INBOtheme
  • Changelog

Reference

Package

INBOtheme-package

Package with several ggplot2 themes

Themes

switch_colour()

Switch the default colour of all geoms

theme_elsevier()

Theme in compliance with the style guide of Elsevier journals

theme_inbo()

The theme in compliance with the INBO style guide version >= 2015.

theme_map()

a ggplot2 theme which removes labels, ticks and titles from both axes.

theme_nara()

The theme for NARA reports.

theme_vlaanderen2015()

The theme in compliance with the Vlaanderen style guide version >= 2015.

Colours

demo_palette()

Demonstrate colours in a palette

inbo_colours_2015

Colour according to the INBO style guide version >= 2015

inbo_palette()

A Colour Palette According the INBO Style Guide Version >= 2015.

nara_palette()

A Colour Palette for NARA reports.

percentcolor()

Make a colour lighter

traffic_palette()

A Colour Palette Ranging From a Dark Red over Medium Orange to Light Green.

vlaanderen_colours

Some colours for the corporate style of vlaanderen.be. Taken from level 1, and level 2 pallette 7

vlaanderen_palette()

A colour pallet according the Vlaanderen style guide version >= 2015.

Scales

scale_colour_discrete() scale_color_discrete()

redefine scale_colour_discrete

scale_colour_gradient() scale_color_gradient()

redefine scale_colour_gradient

scale_colour_gradient2() scale_color_gradient2()

redefine scale_colour_gradient2

scale_fill_discrete()

redefine scale_fill_discrete

scale_fill_gradient()

redefine scale_fill_gradient

scale_fill_gradient2()

redefine scale_fill_gradient2

scale_colour_viridis_d() scale_fill_viridis_d()

redefine scale_colour_viridis_d

Utils

dimensions

Standard dimensions for the Elsevier style guide

Defunct
